Macros

#define ALIF_PINMUX(port, pin, func)
 Encode pinmux configuration.
 
Pinmux encoding bit field definitions
#define ALIF_PINMUX_FUNC_POS   0U
 Bit position for alternate function field.
 
#define ALIF_PINMUX_FUNC_MASK   0x7U
 Bit mask for alternate function field (3 bits)
 
#define ALIF_PINMUX_PIN_POS   3U
 Bit position for pin number field.
 
#define ALIF_PINMUX_PIN_MASK   0x7U
 Bit mask for pin number field (3 bits)
 
#define ALIF_PINMUX_PORT_POS   6U
 Bit position for port number field.
 
#define ALIF_PINMUX_PORT_MASK   0x1FU
 Bit mask for port number field (5 bits)

Detailed Description

Pinctrl definitions for Alif Ensemble SoC family.

This header provides pin multiplexing definitions for the Alif Ensemble family. Each pin can be configured for up to 8 different functions (GPIO + 7 alternate functions).

The pinmux encoding uses an 11-bit value:

  • Bits [0:2] - Alternate function (0 = GPIO, 1-7 = AF1-AF7)
  • Bits [3:5] - Pin number within port (0-7)
  • Bits [6:10] - Port number (0-17)

Pin naming convention: PIN_P{port}_{pin}__{function} Example: PIN_P0_0__UART0_RX_A means Port 0, Pin 0, UART0 RX function (A group)

Macro Definition Documentation

◆ ALIF_PINMUX

#define ALIF_PINMUX (   port,
  pin,
  func 
)
Value:
((((port) & ALIF_PINMUX_PORT_MASK) << ALIF_PINMUX_PORT_POS) | \
(((pin) & ALIF_PINMUX_PIN_MASK) << ALIF_PINMUX_PIN_POS) | \
(((func) & ALIF_PINMUX_FUNC_MASK) << ALIF_PINMUX_FUNC_POS))
ALIF_PINMUX_FUNC_MASK
#define ALIF_PINMUX_FUNC_MASK
Bit mask for alternate function field (3 bits)
Definition alif-ensemble-pinctrl.h:34
ALIF_PINMUX_PORT_MASK
#define ALIF_PINMUX_PORT_MASK
Bit mask for port number field (5 bits)
Definition alif-ensemble-pinctrl.h:42
ALIF_PINMUX_PORT_POS
#define ALIF_PINMUX_PORT_POS
Bit position for port number field.
Definition alif-ensemble-pinctrl.h:40
ALIF_PINMUX_PIN_MASK
#define ALIF_PINMUX_PIN_MASK
Bit mask for pin number field (3 bits)
Definition alif-ensemble-pinctrl.h:38
ALIF_PINMUX_PIN_POS
#define ALIF_PINMUX_PIN_POS
Bit position for pin number field.
Definition alif-ensemble-pinctrl.h:36
ALIF_PINMUX_FUNC_POS
#define ALIF_PINMUX_FUNC_POS
Bit position for alternate function field.
Definition alif-ensemble-pinctrl.h:32

Encode pinmux configuration.

Parameters
portPort number (0-17)
pinPin number within port (0-7)
funcAlternate function (0 = GPIO, 1-7 = AF1-AF7)
Returns
Encoded pinmux value for use in devicetree

◆ ALIF_PINMUX_FUNC_MASK

#define ALIF_PINMUX_FUNC_MASK   0x7U

Bit mask for alternate function field (3 bits)

◆ ALIF_PINMUX_FUNC_POS

#define ALIF_PINMUX_FUNC_POS   0U

Bit position for alternate function field.

◆ ALIF_PINMUX_PIN_MASK

#define ALIF_PINMUX_PIN_MASK   0x7U

Bit mask for pin number field (3 bits)

◆ ALIF_PINMUX_PIN_POS

#define ALIF_PINMUX_PIN_POS   3U

Bit position for pin number field.

◆ ALIF_PINMUX_PORT_MASK

#define ALIF_PINMUX_PORT_MASK   0x1FU

Bit mask for port number field (5 bits)

◆ ALIF_PINMUX_PORT_POS

#define ALIF_PINMUX_PORT_POS   6U

Bit position for port number field.
